chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-513 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The statement has been filed by counsel for the petitioner along with judgment dated 10.07.2025 passed by Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan in Civil Petition No.616-K of 2025, which is taken on record and copy thereof has been supplied to the AAG. The respondents are directed to decide the matter afresh in light of aforementioned judgment of Honorable Supreme Court of Pakistan and furnish such report within thirty days, before Additional Registrar of this Court. Under the circumstances instant petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
